Fan zine illustration poster for K-Pop group "aespa" (MY fandom).
Style: hand-drawn, slightly imperfect, fanzine aesthetic, not glossy.
NO real human faces, NO photorealistic people. Abstract silhouettes or symbolic elements only.
Color palette dominant: #9966FF. Mood: metaverse glitch, neon cyber, dimensional portals, butterflies.
Format: 1200x630 wide poster, atmospheric, no text overlay.
Graphic typography of the text "aespa", custom hand-drawn lettering, monoline style, transparent background, #9966FF accent color, no extra decoration, no real brand logo references.
